objectives: Explain core system design concepts and architectural tradeoffs
Identify common architectural patterns and when to apply them
Document an architecture using clear technical communication
learning_path.title: Foundations of System Design and Software Architecture

objectives: Design resource models and endpoints for REST APIs
Define GraphQL schemas and query patterns
Communicate API contracts and versioning decisions
learning_path.title: API Design with REST and GraphQL

objectives: Model entities and relationships for SQL databases
Choose appropriate NoSQL data models for access patterns
Evaluate consistency, indexing, and query tradeoffs
learning_path.title: Database Design: SQL and NoSQL Modeling

objectives: Differentiate unit, integration, and E2E tests and their roles
Design a balanced test pyramid for a service
Define test coverage goals aligned to risk
learning_path.title: Automated Testing Strategy: Unit, Integration, and E2E

objectives: Design a CI/CD pipeline that builds, tests, and deploys
Integrate automated testing stages into CI/CD
Define rollout and rollback approaches
learning_path.title: CI/CD Pipelines for Reliable Delivery

objectives: Apply structured code review techniques and checklists
Identify correctness, readability, and design issues in changes
Provide actionable feedback using clear technical communication
learning_path.title: Code Review for Quality, Maintainability, and Risk Reduction

objectives: Use systematic approaches to isolate and reproduce issues
Form hypotheses and validate them with evidence
Document incident findings and next steps
learning_path.title: Debugging and Troubleshooting in Production-like Environments

objectives: Design logging, metrics, and tracing for diagnosability
Define service-level signals and alerting principles
Use observability data to support troubleshooting
learning_path.title: Observability: Logging, Metrics, and Tracing

objectives: Identify common application security risks and mitigations
Incorporate security requirements into system and API design
Define security checks that fit into CI/CD
learning_path.title: Security Engineering (AppSec) in Design and Delivery

objectives: Map system components to cloud platform building blocks
Design deployment and operational considerations in the cloud
Align observability and security needs with cloud deployments
learning_path.title: Cloud Platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP): Deploying and Operating Services

objectives: Explain core distributed systems challenges and failure modes
Choose consistency and communication approaches for services
Design for resilience using distributed systems principles
learning_path.title: Distributed Systems: Consistency, Reliability, and Coordination

objectives: Identify bottlenecks and performance risks in a system design
Design scaling strategies for compute, storage, and APIs
Use observability signals to guide performance improvements
learning_path.title: Scalability and Performance Engineering

objectives: Capture technical requirements and decisions using customer relationship management software
Communicate architecture, timelines, and risks clearly to stakeholders
Track follow-ups and outcomes to support delivery and operations
learning_path.title: Customer-Facing Technical Execution with CRM Workflows

matched_occupation.description: Technical sales representatives act for a business to sell its merchandise while providing technical insight for customers.
matched_occupation.label: technical sales representative
